'''"Deadeye" Klintee''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Clantaani]] and an associate of [[Longo Two-Guns]]. He was wanted by [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] for murdering three of the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]].<ref name="TCSWE" /> This [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] was claimed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
